subcodes.first_line: O Lord and my Master! Thou seest how breasts are dilated through Thy verses of holy glory, and hearts made joyous by the sweet-scented breaths wafted from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و مولای تری الصدور منشرحه بایات عز قدسک و القلوب مستبشره بانفاس طیب عبقت من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @poems and quotation from poetry, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @wisdom [hikmat]
